name: Spiced Okra
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground cumin, turmeric, chili powder, salt, and lemon juice in a small bowl.
2. Add the Dijon mustard and stir into a wet paste.
3. Cut off the stems from the okra, then split each pod about three-quarters of the way down.
4. Split the pods again, dividing them into four equal parts that are held together at the narrow end.
5. Pour a little of the paste into each opening, spreading it lightly over the length but not reaching the narrow tip.
6. Sprinkle with additional salt.
7. Heat oil in a skillet and fry the okra, covered, until tender, about 10 minutes, turning them once.
